title: Privacy Compliance Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger privacy compliance foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Privacy Compliance Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Privacy Compliance Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good privacy compliance foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Privacy Compliance Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
